description: A customer requests to have their online account and all associated data deleted.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer's identity to ensure they are the true owner of the account.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent confirms the identity of the person making the request.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer that deleting their account is permanent and will erase their order history and loyalty points.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer understands the consequences and confirms they wish to proceed.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the account deletion process in the customer management system.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer's account is flagged for deletion in accordance with data privacy regulations.
